scope: Correct Senior Capstone automations to the requested gold standard: one active 5x/day orchestrator, standby specialist prompts, no-intervention approval preflight/fallbacks, self-healing prompt/script repair, accepted default Cloudflare stack decision, and stricter contract checks.

live_automation_updates.name: Senior Capstone Figma Product Design Standby
Senior Capstone Canva Visual System Standby
Senior Capstone Content Quality Audit Standby
Senior Capstone Weekly Deep Audit Rebuilt

decisions.summary: Senior Capstone now uses one active 5x/day gold-standard orchestrator with standby specialist prompts.
HD-2026-05-18-001 and ADR-0001 are accepted as the default Cloudflare stack path.

backlog_updates.summary: Stack decision accepted; next action is scaffold implementation.

verification: active schedule scan returned no exact start conflicts across all local automations

self_improvement.evidence: The previous contract checker allowed drift in names/statuses/RRULEs. It now enforces the gold-standard Senior automation configuration.

next: The 5x/day orchestrator should scaffold the accepted Cloudflare stack path from ADR-0001 and SC-005.
Keep daily reporting inside the orchestrator unless Bryan explicitly asks to reactivate the standalone daily report.
